pi_items.source: task.json description: 'click the RETAIL button to start a new retail order'; verifier.py checks is_retail_type field
task.json description: 'add at least 3 distinct items to the order'; specified in task requirements
task.json description: 'Ensure one of the items has a quantity of 2 (so the total item count is at least 4)'; verifier.py checks item_count >= 4
task.json description: 'Select CASH as the payment method and process the full payment'; verifier.py checks paid_cash field

privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a RETAIL order in Floreant POS v1.4 (build 1707b) with at least 3 distinct menu items (4 total items including one with quantity 2), then settling the order using CASH payment. Floreant POS is a real open-source restaurant point-of-sale system using Apache Derby embedded database. Data is synthetic, stored in local Derby database (TICKET, TICKET_ITEM, POS_TRANSACTION tables). Verifier checks: new ticket created (30pts), RETAIL type (30pts), item count >=4 (20pts), CASH payment (20pts), with anti-gaming penalty for completion <10s.
